mapper.sql: ar.id, ar.elder_id elderId, e.name elderName, ar.accompany_type accompanyType, ar.start_time startTime, ar.end_time endTime, ar.duration_minutes durationMinutes, ar.companion, ar.content, ar.emotion_result emotionResult, ar.remark, ar.create_date createDate, ar.update_date updateDate
mapper.select:
select
from t_accompany_record ar left join t_elder e on ar.elder_id = e.id
and e.name like concat('%', #{elderName}, '%')
and ar.accompany_type = #{accompanyType}
and ar.companion like concat('%', #{companion}, '%')
and ar.emotion_result = #{emotionResult}
order by ar.start_time desc, ar.id desc

select
from t_accompany_record ar left join t_elder e on ar.elder_id = e.id where ar.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into t_accompany_record (elder_id, accompany_type, start_time, end_time, duration_minutes, companion, content, emotion_result, remark, create_date, update_date) values (#{elderId}, #{accompanyType}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{durationMinutes}, #{companion}, #{content}, #{emotionResult}, #{remark}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update t_accompany_record set elder_id = #{elderId}, accompany_type = #{accompanyType}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes}, companion = #{companion}, content = #{content}, emotion_result = #{emotionResult}, remark = #{remark}, update_date = now() where id = #{id}
